name: screenshot-annotator
description: Annotate screenshots in a local browser canvas (shapes, arrows, numbered markers, redaction boxes, per-mark notes), then return the flattened image plus a compact JSON sidecar.
long_description: Opens an interactive browser canvas to mark up a screenshot, then hands the flattened annotated PNG plus a structured JSON description (geometry normalized 0..1, per-mark semantic intent and notes) back into the conversation. Redaction boxes destroy the underlying pixels.

tools.name: annotate_screenshot
tools.description: Open an interactive browser canvas to annotate a screenshot, then return the annotated image plus a compact JSON description.
